prose.title: 89b mos
prose.body: The 89B Military Occupational Specialty (MOS) is known as Ammunition Stock Control and Accounting Specialist. These specialists are responsible for maintaining the accountability and control of ammunition within the military, ensuring that all ammunition is properly stored, documented, and distributed. They also conduct inventory management, ammunition surveillance, and quality control to ensure the ammunition is safe and serviceable. Additionally, they may provide support during ammunition resupply operations.
